SELECT u.name, ROUND(AVG(pc.compliance_score)::NUMERIC * 10, 1) AS avg_compliance_score
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON u.id = i.agent_id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN policy_compliance pc ON pc.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY avg_compliance_score ASC, u.id ASC
LIMIT 5

JOIN interactions i ON u.id = i.agent_id
JOIN utterances ut ON i.id = ut.interaction_id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND u.role = 'agent'
  AND ut.speaker_role = 'customer'
  AND ut.emotion = 'frustrated'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY frustrated_count DESC, u.id ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT DATE(i.interaction_date) AS call_date, COUNT(*) AS volume
FROM interactions i
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND i.interaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
GROUP BY DATE(i.interaction_date)
ORDER BY call_date DESC
LIMIT 50
judge_reasoning: result sets match (rows; alias diff ref=['day', 'calls'] got=['call_date', 'volume'])

raw_response:
SELECT u.name,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.was_resolved THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::NUMERIC * 100, 1) AS resolved_rate
FROM users u
JOIN interactions i ON i.agent_id = u.id AND i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
JOIN interaction_scores s ON s.interaction_id = i.id
WHERE u.role = 'agent'
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY resolved_rate DESC, u.id ASC
LIMIT 50
judge_reasoning: result sets match (rows; alias diff ref=['name', 'pct'] got=['name', 'resolved_rate'])

raw_response:
SELECT i.id::text AS interaction_id, i.duration_seconds, i.interaction_date, u.name AS agent_name
FROM interactions i
JOIN users u ON i.agent_id = u.id
WHERE i.organization_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
  AND i.duration_seconds > 319
  AND i.interaction_date >= date_trunc('month', now())
ORDER BY i.duration_seconds DESC, i.id ASC
LIMIT 50
